{{Infobox group
| name = Estyr Six
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Estyr Six Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] Six is a legendary figure and one of the three surviving companions of [[the Emperor]]. A [[Soulbound]] of immense power, she is a renowned warrior capable of flight and wielding [[Intent]] with extreme subtlety. Historically, she served as the interim [[Head of the Imperial Guard]], a role in which she enforced the security of original prisons by using a device to detect [[Readers]]. She is also recognized as a [[Regent]] and the [[Imperial Steward]] of the [[Aurelian Empire]]. Born into a family known as [[Estyr Fourteen]], she earned her current title following a devastating attack by the [[Worm Lord]], [[Kthanikahr]], which resulted in the death of her people. Her combat style often involves a macabre halo of three orbiting Hydra skulls. Known for being a terrifying and formidable presence, she is documented in various historical journals and remains a figure of significant mythic status, with her tomb and statues existing as landmarks. Despite her legendary strength and reputation for destruction, she is noted for lacking the desire to rule as [[Empress]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|As a hero of the early [[Empire]], [[Estyr]] Six served as an interim [[Head of the Imperial Guard]] and recorded details regarding prisons in her journal. During the conflict alongside [[the Emperor]], she helped defeat [[Nakothi]] and later provided testimony concerning the [[Handmaidens of Nakothi]]. Her legendary status is further highlighted by her flight over a thousand [[Elderspawn]], and she remains a potential [[Empress]] of the [[Aurelian Empire]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Estyr Six]] defeated [[Nakothi]] alongside [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Estyr Six]] was a hero of the early [[Empire]] and her journal mentions prisons.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Estyr Six]] served as an interim [[Head of the Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The inimitable [[Estyr Six]] provided testimony regarding the [[Handmaidens of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Estyr Six]] flew over the ranks of a thousand [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Estyr Six]] is a potential [[Empress]] of the [[Aurelian Empire]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Estyr Six]] is a figure who would admire the spirit of a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Estyr Six]] is the leader of the [[Regents]] and described as the most terrifying woman in history.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Estyr Six]] is a group whose journals contain quotes.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Estyr Six]] is a person who can get involved in conflicts.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Estyr Six]] is a companion of [[Jorin Maze-walker]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Born as [[Estyr Fourteen]], the ruler known as [[Estyr]] Six is a leader who lacks the necessary will to govern. Although poets and historians have documented the accomplishments of the [[Estyr]] Six for many generations, [[Jorin]] has noted specific qualities in the manner in which people address the ruler. This figure last spoke five hundred years ago, and their [[Vessels]] are capable of experiencing both fury and rage.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Estyr Six]] is a ruler who lacks the will to rule.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Estyr Six]] was born [[Estyr Fourteen]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Estyr Six]]'s [[Vessels]] can feel rage and fury.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jorin]] compares the way people speak to [[Estyr Six]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The accomplishments of the [[Estyr Six]] have been written about by poets and historians for generations.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Estyr Six]] spoke five hundred years ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A statuesque [[Regent]] with long blonde hair, [[Estyr]] Six is a member of the first generation of [[Readers]] and is bound by an ancient arrangement to [[the Emperor]]'s will. As the strongest [[Soulbound]] in history, she possesses a high weight of [[Intent]] and is accompanied by three floating Hydra skulls known as [[Vessels]]. She maintains the philosophy that leadership requires giving orders, and she utilizes her power to project a forceful will that [[Calder]] has felt. During her conflicts against [[General Teach]] and [[Baldezar Kern]], she has accused [[Calder]] of collaborating with [[Elders]]. Furthermore, she possesses the ability to locate and kill [[Calder]] regardless of his location and can use an invisible hand to seize a person's throat.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] stated hundreds of years ago that if you are not giving orders, you are not in charge.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] has the ability to find and kill [[Calder]] even if he hides in a bunker.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] is a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] is a [[Regent]] and a statuesque woman with long blonde hair.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] has three reptilian skulls floating around her head which are the [[Vessels]] that make her the strongest [[Soulbound]] in history.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] is part of an ancient arrangement.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] is fighting against [[General Teach]] and [[Baldezar Kern]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] is a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] is subject to [[the Emperor]]'s will.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] were among the first generation of [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has felt the force of will projected by [[Estyr Six]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] accused [[Calder]] of collaborating with [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] has blonde hair.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] has a high weight of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] has three Hydra skulls floating around her.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr Six]] can use an invisible hand to seize a person's throat.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A historical figure and the [[Regent]] of the North, [[Estyr]] Six served as a partner in rebellion to [[the Emperor]]. Known as an unstoppable one-woman army, she utilized hydra skulls and three circling skulls to stay aloft. During her exploits, she crashed through the northern wall of a top floor and was later sought by [[Cheska Bennett]]. Clad in armor, she flew over [[Candle Bay]] using massive iron spikes while levitating a pile of wood that had once been a ship.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is [[the Emperor]]'s partner in rebellion and uses power involving hydra skulls to stay aloft.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is described as an unstoppable one-woman army.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is accompanied by three circling skulls.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is a girlhood hero to [[Jarelys Teach]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is a person for whom victory depends on obtaining skulls.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] crashed through the northern wall of the top floor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is the [[Regent]] of the North.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is a group whose judgment [[Shera]] compares to [[Meia]]'s.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is a historical figure.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] asked where [[the Emperor]] was.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] showed no signs of improvement.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is referred to as [[Estyr Six]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] is a person [[Cheska Bennett]] attempted to stop.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|An armored [[Estyr Six]] flew over to [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] uses massive iron spikes.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A pile of wood that had once been a ship was levitating before [[Estyr Six]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Or as Estyr Six had put it, hundreds of years ago: “If you’re not giving the orders, you’re not the one in charge.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Estyr Six herself would admire your spirit.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"My oath to eternity, you all sound like Estyr Six."<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
